evals.expected_output: Discovers test files, coverage reports, CI gates, and QA documentation in the current repo; asks about external test repos, test case management (Jira/Zephyr, TestRail, ADO), and QA doc storage; then writes qa-strategy.md and qa-health.md under .agentic/guides/testing/.

assertions.name: discovers-first
assertions.description: The response inspects the repo's test infrastructure before asking about external tooling.

assertions.name: writes-both-guides
assertions.description: Both qa-strategy.md and qa-health.md are produced under .agentic/guides/testing/.

evals.prompt: qa init — this repo has no test case management system and no external QA docs.
evals.expected_output: Completes with repo-local discovery only: records that no external adapters are configured, and still writes both guides so qa-planner has a foundation to read on every feature run.

assertions.name: optional-integrations
assertions.description: Absent external systems are recorded as not configured rather than blocking the run.

assertions.name: guides-still-written
assertions.description: qa-strategy.md and qa-health.md are written even with no external integrations.

evals.prompt: Refresh the QA foundation — our test setup changed since the last run.
evals.expected_output: Re-runs discovery and overwrites both guides; re-running is documented as safe and idempotent for these two files.

assertions.name: safe-rerun
assertions.description: The existing guides are overwritten with refreshed content, not duplicated or appended to.
